payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown mahogany wooden side cabinet with a single top drawer over a paneled door, molded plinth base, metal knob and glossy finish; vertical rectangular form, mostly visible though slightly occluded on the left by adjacent sofa, approximate distance ~1.0 m from camera.
